title: Canva wants you to have full control over the design – Code 2.0 just does the heavy lifting for you
summary: Initially teased at Canva’s annual Create conference earlier this year and available only to the first million users who cracked an easter egg, the Australian software vendor has officially made Canva Code 2.0 generally available across the board, including to free users…
